name: Diamond Paint Art
description: Relax and find peace as you complete joyful artworks by pushing diamonds onto a canvas in this cool color pop by number game. Simply follow the numbers and paint as quickly or slowly as you like - thrill to the satisfying ‘click’ with the color pop as the diamond finds its place. Watch your masterpiece sparkle with each color you complete. A soothing, zen experience that is sure to leave you happy and mindful.
instructions: Mouse Click and Tap to play
